issue_title: [Bug] Provider password allows spaces during creation
issue_body_preview:
Describe the bug
When creating a provider, the system currently accepts passwords that contain spaces. This can lead to authentication errors and unexpected connection failures when the system tries to use those credentials.

To Reproduce

Go to Create Provider.

Enter a password containing spaces (
test_description_zh: 进入创建 Provider 页面，在密码输入框中输入包含空格的密码（例如 'pass word 123'），然后尝试提交表单，观察系统对含空格密码的校验行为。
expected_result_zh: 系统应拒绝包含空格的密码，在密码输入框附近显示相应的校验错误提示信息，表单不应被成功提交。
